TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Hbun-sinqumi ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 91 buwan, 233 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 170 hi, binah ga,, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 63 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 67%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga Ulay. tay 'zil na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga Kin'lwan. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga Rahu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa,, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa ulaj. taj ʔzil na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa kinʔlwan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa raħuʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Hbun-sinqumi ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 91 buwan, 233 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 170 hi, binah ga,, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 63 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 67%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga Ulay. tay 'zil na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga Kin'lwan. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-sinqumi hya' ga Rahu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa,, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa ulaj. taj ʔzil na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa kinʔlwan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-s~ɕinqumi ħjaʔ ɣa raħuʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
